goal: 修正 cutover status 终态 nextActions

summary.title: 修正 cutover status 终态下一步
summary.what: 让 release cutover status 读取 release decision packet 里的 external acceptance 与 old-mainline maintenance/reference 状态；当 gate 已绿且这些记录已存在时，nextActions 不再提示重复记录 acceptance 或切旧主线，而是收敛到外部 store/deployment submission 或一个人类定义的 real-profile UAT。新增了针对 ready-state nextActions 的 Vitest 覆盖。
summary.why: queue 为空且 repo-side gate 绿之后，workflow 的核心风险是继续围绕已完成动作打转或重新拆 deferred 小票。状态门禁需要把当前真实决策状态暴露出来，帮助后续 agent 继续 cutover delivery，而不是回到细碎 backlog。
summary.user_goal: 修正 cutover status 终态 nextActions

decisions.point: ready 状态下的 nextActions 来源
decisions.chose: 从 docs/release-cutover-decision-packet-2026-05-27.md 解析 external acceptance 和 old_mainline_status
decisions.rationale: 该 packet 是 queue 为空后进入 cutover delivery 的决策真相源；status gate 应根据它避免 stale nextActions。
rejected: 继续固定返回 record external acceptance decision / switch old browser plugin mainline

decisions.chose: 当 acceptance 已记录且旧主线已 maintenance/reference 时，只提示外部 store/deployment submission 或一个 real-profile UAT，并明确不生成默认 deferred implementation issue
decisions.rationale: 这把 workflow 继续推进到真实产品交付边界，避免越分越小。

decisions.chose: 把解析和 nextActions 逻辑拆成可导入纯函数，并用 apps/mv3-shell/test 下的 Vitest spec 覆盖终态和未切旧主线两种分支
decisions.rationale: 当前 Vitest include 不覆盖 scripts/*.spec.ts，把测试放进已有测试目录能进入 repo-wide check。

review_notes: CLI 本体运行：bun scripts/release-cutover-status.ts；repo-side acceptance/build/真实 Chromium MV3 smoke/repo-wide check 均通过，命令因本地分支当时未提交/无 upstream 报 delivery blocker，但输出 releaseDecision.recorded=true、oldMainlineSwitched=true。

behavioral_changes: release-cutover-status output now includes releaseDecision parsed from the cutover decision packet.

When blockers are empty and acceptance plus old-mainline switch are already recorded, release-cutover-status nextActions now point to external submission or one real-profile UAT instead of repeated acceptance/switch actions.
release-cutover-status top-level execution is guarded so helper functions can be imported by tests without running the CLI.

api_changes.signature: bun run release:cutover:status JSON output adds releaseDecision and refined nextActions
